3175440.name: Stow It!!!
3175440.description:
You ever worked at a warehouse? You want to work for a warehouse? Well now you can from the comfort of your home!

In this new game Stow It!

Stow items into bins in a timely manner and complete your work shift. You will also be responsible for not messing up too many times or you will be fired and lose the game! Look forward to completing work shifts enjoying your lunch break, bonus rounds, and the car ride home!

See how long you can survive….. work at a warehouse following all the rules that are placed before you! Good luck!!!


WELCOME TO THE RELEASE OF STOW IT!!! HERE I5 WHAT IT HAS TO OFFER!

• 2O LEVELS OF ACTION PACKED STOWING FUN
* 3 BONUS ROUNDS THROUGHOUT THE GAME
* RELEASE BUTTOM TO CHANGE PODS AND CLEAR ITEMS
* SMALL. MEDIUM, LARGE ITEMS TO STOW
* PINK BINS TO AVOID LEVEL 4-20
* MR. SNITCH INCOMING

FUTURE UPDATES!

* MINI GAMES MENU WILL BE AVALIABLE
* REACTIVE ITEMS
" CO WORKER PUNCHOUT
* REACTIVE PARTY
* ENDLESS MODE
